title: Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides
posterAlt: Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides (2011) movie poster
tmdbOverview: When Jack crosses paths with a woman from his past, he's not sure if it's love...or if she's a ruthless con artist using him to find the fabled Fountain of Youth.
synopsis: Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides is a 2011 adventure, action and fantasy film from United States and United Kingdom. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
